Phase 4 · alpha_centauri · Dante

Dante

9 결정decisions · 9 gated · 0 divergence
identity 확정Gated범위 내In-window

body_type=규산염 화산 위성(900 km, 8.0e21 kg, 밀도 ~2620 kg/m³). designation=Alpha Centauri A b I · cultural=Dante(designations 블록, 인게임 설명에만). discoverability=fictional(합성 위성, 실검출 없음). Io형 화산 세계.
body_type=silicate volcanic moon (900 km, 8.0e21 kg, density ~2620 kg/m³). designation=Alpha Centauri A b I · cultural=Dante (designations block, in-game description only). discoverability=fictional (synthetic moon, no real detection). An Io-type volcanic world.

필드Field값Value
body_typesilicate volcanic moon (900 km, 8.0e21 kg, ρ ~2620 kg/m³)
designationAlpha Centauri A b I
cultural_nameDante
discoverabilityfictional
discoverability fictional · IGNORELEVELS F F F F
evidence Io형 화산 세계. discoverability=fictional → RB IGNORELEVELS F F F F(전 난도 관측-발견), researchbodies-cfg db-mapping canonical.An Io-type volcanic world. discoverability=fictional → RB IGNORELEVELS F F F F (observation-discovered at all difficulties), researchbodies-cfg db-mapping canonical.
bulk 확정Gated범위 내In-window

mass 8.0e21 kg · radius 900 km (둘 다 INVENTED, canon 수치 없음 — 밀도 ~2620 kg/m³ 규산암체로 affirm). rotation=폴리페무스 조석고정 → 자전=공전 ≈ 9.2h(a=110,000km·M_Poly 120M⊕서 도출, 최내곽). obliquity ~0° (락 감쇠). 조석 삼축 C̄₂₂≈0.012 (φ=0.80 부분용융, a−c~16% 계란형, 모행성 방향), 자전 J₂는 소형이나 조석 bulge가 지배. reference_radius 900 km (body-figure-methodology.md). internal_heat=조석열(bulk.tidal_heating 행, ~820× Io). age=계 5.3 Gyr 상속. spin_axis=궤도 법선. 질량·반경은 art-invented. 강체 로슈(~48.5k)·유체 로슈 (~98.9k)에서 110k는 안전(final_2026_06_21). 조석고정·obliquity~0이라 축계절 없음, 경도칭동 ±~0.6°(e=0.01).
mass 8.0e21 kg · radius 900 km (both INVENTED, no canon figures — affirmed as a silicate-rock body at density ~2620 kg/m³). rotation=tidally locked to Polyphemus → spin=orbit ≈ 9.2h (derived from a=110,000km·M_Poly 120M⊕, innermost). obliquity ~0° (lock damping). Tidal triaxiality C̄₂₂≈0.012 (φ=0.80 partial melt, a−c~16% egg shape, toward the parent planet); the spin J₂ is small but the tidal bulge dominates. reference_radius 900 km (body-figure-methodology.md). internal_heat=tidal (bulk.tidal_heating row, ~820× Io). age=inherited from the system's 5.3 Gyr. spin_axis=orbit normal. mass·radius are art-invented. At rigid Roche (~48.5k)·fluid Roche (~98.9k), 110k is safe (final_2026_06_21). Tidally locked·obliquity~0, so no axial seasons; longitudinal libration ±~0.6° (e=0.01).

필드Field값Value
mass8.0e21 kg
INVENTED
radius900 km
INVENTED
gravity0.659 m/s2
GM/R² 파생 에코
flattening0.098
= (5/2)·J₂ 평균적도 spheroid — 시각 슬롯; 계란 장축 a−c~16%는 C22 행 note
reference_radius900 km
J2/C22 기준 반경 = radius
rotation_period9.2 h
tidally locked (자전=공전)
obliquity0 deg
geopotential_j20.039 · R_ref 900 km
= 10/3·C̄₂₂, φ0.80
geopotential_c220.0118
조석 삼축, a−c~16% 계란형(모행성 방향)
internal_heattidal (see bulk.tidal_heating row, ~820× Io)
age5.3 Gyr
spin_axis_orientationorbit normal
evidence 질량·반경은 art-invented. 강체 로슈(~48.5k)·유체 로슈(~98.9k)에서 110k는 안전(final_2026_06_21). 조석고정·obliquity~0이라 축계절 없음, 경도칭동 ±~0.6°(e=0.01).mass·radius are art-invented. At rigid Roche (~48.5k)·fluid Roche (~98.9k), 110k is safe (final_2026_06_21). Tidally locked·obliquity~0, so no axial seasons; longitudinal libration ±~0.6° (e=0.01).
magnetism.magnetic_field 확정Gated범위 내In-window

고유 자기장 없음 — Io처럼 격렬 화산이어도 자체 dynamo 불가(Io도 유도장만). 단 Dante는 최내곽(1.54 R_p) 플라스마 공급원. magnetosphere/radiation_belts 고유값 없음. Dante 화산 SO₂/황 토러스가 폴리페무스 belt를 먹임(environment.radiation 인과고리). 최내곽이라 방사선 극심·무방비.
No intrinsic magnetic field — even with violent Io-like volcanism, a self-dynamo is impossible (Io too has only an induced field). But Dante is the innermost (1.54 R_p) plasma source. No intrinsic magnetosphere/radiation_belts. Dante's volcanic SO₂/sulfur torus feeds the Polyphemus belt (environment.radiation causal loop). Being innermost, radiation is extreme·unshielded.

필드Field값Value
magnetic_fieldnone (no intrinsic dynamo; Io식 유도장만)
evidence magnetosphere/radiation_belts 고유값 없음. Dante 화산 SO₂/황 토러스가 폴리페무스 belt를 먹임(environment.radiation 인과고리). 최내곽이라 방사선 극심·무방비.No intrinsic magnetosphere/radiation_belts. Dante's volcanic SO₂/sulfur torus feeds the Polyphemus belt (environment.radiation causal loop). Being innermost, radiation is extreme·unshielded.
bulk.tidal_heating 확정Gated범위 내In-window

극단 ~820× Io (평균 e 0.0175). 표면 조석 플럭스 ~8,000 W/m² (T_tidal ~600K; 피크 e 0.033서 ~40,000 W/m²·~900K).
Extreme ~820× Io (mean e 0.0175). Surface tidal flux ~8,000 W/m² (T_tidal ~600K; at peak e 0.033, ~40,000 W/m²·~900K).

필드Field값Value
tidal_heating~820× Io (평균 e 0.0175)
tidal_surface_flux~8000 W/m² (T~600K; 피크 e 0.033서 ~40000 W/m²·~900K)
evidence Io 스케일링(Ė∝M_p^2.5·R^5·e²·a^-7.5), 1.54 R_p·평균 e 0.0175 → ~820× Io. 시뮬서 e가 0.0002–0.031로 진동하며 안 죽음(Hades 등 섭동이 강제 유지) → 영구. 캐넌(Avatar: The Game) "조석력 영구 화산+월진, Roche 가장자리"와 정확히 일치.
Io scaling (Ė∝M_p^2.5·R^5·e²·a^-7.5), 1.54 R_p·mean e 0.0175 → ~820× Io. In the sim e oscillates 0.0002–0.031 without dying (perturbations from Hades etc. force-sustain it) → perpetual. Exactly matches the canon (Avatar: The Game) "tidally driven perpetual volcanism+moonquakes, Roche edge".
surface 확정Gated범위 내In-window

규산염 화산 세계(Io형 격렬). 조석고정 → 대면 반구(sub-planet)에 시그니처 단일 대협곡(Valles Marineris급) + 바닥 용암호 사슬. 반구 대비: 대면=용암호·황 격렬, far-side=식어 굳은 흑현무암 평원+충돌구. 활동 조석축 집중, anti-planet 쌍둥이 균열(약함) 가능. 마그마 바다 아님(T<규산염 용융 ~1400K). albedo 0.30(group 5 facet-walk 2026-06-22: 오너 = 화산/균열 중심 이중-재질, 황 반(~0.5)·현무암 반(~0.10) → 벌크 평균 ~0.30. 단일 어두운(0.10)·단일 Io밝음(0.5) 미채택, 반반 맵). surface_temperature_k 230(입사 ambient ~230K, albedo 0.30, α Cen A 1.6 AU) + 화산 핫스팟 ~600K(sub-Polyphemus 용암면, HazardousBody가 LongitudeCurve로 고정면에 부여). 양극 분포.
Silicate volcanic world (Io-type violence). Tidally locked → a signature single grand canyon (Valles Marineris-class) on the sub-planet hemisphere + a chain of floor lava lakes. Hemisphere contrast: sub-planet=violent lava lakes·sulfur, far-side=cooled hardened black-basalt plains+craters. Activity concentrated on the tidal axis, possible (weak) twin fracture at anti-planet. Not a magma ocean (T<silicate melting ~1400K). albedo 0.30 (group 5 facet-walk 2026-06-22: owner = volcano/fracture-centered dual-material, sulfur half (~0.5)·basalt half (~0.10) → bulk mean ~0.30. A single dark (0.10)·single Io-bright (0.5) was not adopted, a half-and-half map). surface_temperature_k 230 (incident ambient ~230K, albedo 0.30, α Cen A 1.6 AU) + volcanic hotspots ~600K (sub-Polyphemus lava surface, assigned to the fixed face by HazardousBody via LongitudeCurve). Bimodal distribution.

필드Field값Value
surface_typesilicate volcanic (Io-type)
albedo0.3
황 반 ~0.5 / 현무암 반 ~0.10 벌크 평균
surface_temperature230 K ambient + ~600K 화산 핫스팟 K
evidence 캐넌 '영구 화산+월진+주황 용암 반점'. 조석가열은 비균일 — asthenosphere 소산이면 적도·조석축(sub/anti-planet) 강화라 sub-Polyphemus 거대 균열+용암호는 물리 동기 있음(실제 Io는 경도 ~30–60° offset, 아트 허용). 그 균열의 화산 plasma가 방사선대를 먹임(environment.radiation 행).
Canon 'perpetual volcanism+moonquakes+orange lava flecks'. Tidal heating is non-uniform — with asthenosphere dissipation, the equator·tidal axis (sub/anti-planet) are enhanced, so the sub-Polyphemus giant fracture+lava lakes have physical motivation (real Io has a ~30–60° longitude offset, art-permitted). That fracture's volcanic plasma feeds the radiation belt (environment.radiation row).
appearance 확정Gated범위 내In-window

고대비 이중-재질(Io 유추) — 화산·균열 중심에 황 평원 반(노랑 #d9c24a, 밝음), 그 밖은 흑현무암 반(어두움 #2a2622). 대협곡·칼데라·용암호는 발광(적→황백 #ff5a1e→#ffd070, 온도별), 야간측 주황 실선. 대면 반구 천정엔 Polyphemus 고정(용암 협곡 발밑/가스자이언트 머리 위)=시그니처 풍경. 황 평원/현무암 반반 고대비(albedo 평균 ~0.30), 화산·균열 중심 배치. 균열만 발광. 캐넌 'orange lava flecks'에서 황 면적을 반으로 확대(오너 2026-06-22).
High-contrast dual-material (Io analogy) — a sulfur-plain half (yellow #d9c24a, bright) centered on volcanoes·fractures, the rest a black-basalt half (dark #2a2622). Grand canyons·calderas·lava lakes glow (red→yellow-white #ff5a1e→#ffd070 by temperature), orange lines on the night side. At the sub-planet hemisphere zenith, Polyphemus is fixed (lava canyons underfoot/gas giant overhead) = signature scenery. High-contrast sulfur-plain/basalt halves (albedo mean ~0.30), arranged around volcanoes·fractures. Only the fractures glow. From the canon 'orange lava flecks', the sulfur area is expanded to half (owner 2026-06-22).

필드Field값Value
surfacesulfur plains #d9c24a (밝음) / basalt #2a2622 (어두움), 고대비 이중-재질
emission_glowlava #ff5a1e→#ffd070 (온도별), 협곡·칼데라·용암호
evidence 황 평원/현무암 반반 고대비(albedo 평균 ~0.30), 화산·균열 중심 배치. 균열만 발광. 캐넌 'orange lava flecks'에서 황 면적을 반으로 확대(오너 2026-06-22).High-contrast sulfur-plain/basalt halves (albedo mean ~0.30), arranged around volcanoes·fractures. Only the fractures glow. From the canon 'orange lava flecks', the sulfur area is expanded to half (owner 2026-06-22).
atmosphere 확정Gated범위 내In-window

희박 SO₂/황 화산 분출(Io 유추), 비호흡 (stock atmosphereContainsOxygen=false). 화산 outgassing 기원 tenuous, 안정 대기 아님.Tenuous SO₂/sulfur volcanic outgassing (Io analogy), non-breathable (stock atmosphereContainsOxygen=false). Volcanic-outgassing-origin tenuous, not a stable atmosphere.

필드Field값Value
compositiontenuous SO₂/sulfur (화산 outgassing, Io 유추)
breathabilityFalse
evidence 화산 outgassing 기원 tenuous, 안정 대기 아님.Volcanic-outgassing-origin tenuous, not a stable atmosphere.
environment.radiation 확정Gated범위 내In-window

극심 >4,500 rem/day (캐넌). 출처=Polyphemus 방사선대, Dante 자체 화산 플라스마가 공급.
Extreme >4,500 rem/day (canon). Source=Polyphemus radiation belt, supplied by Dante's own volcanic plasma.

필드Field값Value
radiation>4,500 rem/day (극심)
evidence 캐넌 "최내곽 moonlet >4,500 rem/day(Io 3,200)". 약한 170µT 장에도 성립 — 벨트 세기는 場이 아니라 공급원(source) 지배: Dante 820× Io 화산이 막대한 SO₂/황 플라스마 토러스 공급(Io→목성 벨트 초강화판) → 조밀 트랩 입자 → 강벨트. 인과고리: Dante 화산이 자신을 굽는 벨트를 먹임. 캐넌 >4500 ↔ dynamo 170µT 충돌 없이 화해(場 발산 불요). cf. Pandora는 캐넌대로 "두 벨트 사이"라 보호.
Canon "innermost moonlet >4,500 rem/day (Io 3,200)". Holds even with the weak 170µT field — belt intensity is governed by the source, not the field: Dante's 820× Io volcanism supplies an enormous SO₂/sulfur plasma torus (a super-enhanced Io→Jupiter belt) → dense trapped particles → a strong belt. Causal loop: Dante's volcanism feeds the belt that bakes it. Canon >4500 ↔ dynamo 170µT reconciled without conflict (no field inflation needed). cf. Pandora is protected per canon by being "between the two belts".
gameplay 확정Gated범위 내In-window

착륙=중간. 용암 없는 구역은 단기 착륙 가능하나 고온 차폐 필수, 대면측은 방사선도 극심. far-side는 상대적 안전(저방사선·저온) 거점. 바이옴(6): 대협곡(Grand Chasma) / 용암호 사슬(Lava Lakes, sub-Polyphemus 고정면 최고온) / 황 평원(Sulfur Plains) / 현무암 평원(Basalt Plains, far-side) / 화산추·칼데라(Volcanic Cones) / 극(Poles, geographic 고위도). 극은 조석고정+obliquity~0이라 seasonal 아닌 지리적 구분. 무착륙 지옥과 자유착륙의 중간 — 고위험·고보상. far-side가 베이스캠프.
Landing=intermediate. Lava-free zones allow short landings but high-temperature shielding is essential, and the sub-planet side also has extreme radiation. The far-side is a relatively safe (low-radiation·low-temperature) base. Biomes (6): Grand Chasma / Lava Lakes (sub-Polyphemus fixed face, hottest) / Sulfur Plains / Basalt Plains (far-side) / Volcanic Cones / Poles (geographic high latitude). The poles are tidally locked+obliquity~0, so a geographic rather than seasonal distinction. Between no-landing hell and free landing — high-risk·high-reward. The far-side is the base camp.

필드Field값Value
science_biomes6: Grand Chasma / Lava Lakes / Sulfur Plains / Basalt Plains / Volcanic Cones / Poles
Grand Chasma #3A3B4ALava Lakes #C8492CSulfur Plains #C9A93EBasalt Plains #4E463FVolcanic Cones #7E4A3CPoles #D8D0B6
evidence 무착륙 지옥과 자유착륙의 중간 — 고위험·고보상. far-side가 베이스캠프.Between no-landing hell and free landing — high-risk·high-reward. The far-side is the base camp.
← Alpha Centauri BHades →
